sanskrit:
यद्यद्विभूतिमत्सत्त्वं श्रीमदूर्जितमेव वा।
तत्तदेवावगच्छ त्वं मम तेजोंऽशसम्भवम्॥
transliteration: yad yad vibhūtimat sattvaṁ śrīmad ūrjitam eva vā | tattad evāvagaccha tvaṁ mama tejo-’ṁśa-sambhavam ||
literal_meaning: Whatever entity possesses splendor, prosperity, or might—know that it arises from a spark of My radiance.
contextual_meaning: All awe-inspiring excellence is a partial reflection of an infinite source; the mind can relax its compulsive comparison because every peak human experience is only a fragment of a vaster field.
psychological_state: Cognitive re-framing from scarcity-based envy to abundance-based participation.
trigger_scenario: Scrolling LinkedIn and feeling small when everyone seems more accomplished—then remembering their brilliance is a shard of the same light within you.
anchor_text: Every spark of greatness you see is a glimpse of the same infinite light.
